title: gnaphalium arabicum
intro: Gnaphalium arabicum, also known as wormwood or arabis wormwood, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Middle East and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Gnaphalium arabicum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Gnaphalium arabicum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using the plant's essential oil in creams and ointments.
